entry.title: New: CR 24-76 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 69, CD1 (2024), to change the zoning from Urban Reserve District to B-CT Country Town Business District (Conditional Zoning) for 21,711 square feet in Hāna, Maui, Hawaiʻi, tax map key (2) 1-4-013:001, for Hāna Store Storage Building to reestablish commercial uses on the property; and 2. RECORDATION of the Unilateral Agreement.

Housing and Land Use Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
